name: Ezo Pmp → Dose With Constant Flow Rate
description: Use this action in an [automations](https://esphome.io/automations) to have the peristaltic pump dose an specific `volume` (in milliliters) every minute for the provided `duration` (in minutes). At the end of the time period the pump will have dosed the specified `volume` times the `duration`. If the volume is negative the pump will run backwards.

config_entries.label: Duration
config_entries.description: The time (in minutes) the pump will dose the volume requested every minute.

config_entries.label: Volume Per Minute
config_entries.description: The volume to dose in milliliters every minute. If negative, pump will run in reverse.
